name: Keychron Q3 HE QMK Wireless Custom Keyboard - Carbon Black - Adjustable-actuation-point Gateron Double-Rail Magnetic Nebula Switch - Included Mac & Windows Keycaps - Wired / 2.4GHz / Bluetooth Connectivity - Double-Gasket Design - Hot-Swappable (Q3H-M1)
